body:
## Rationale

Current `top10Lists` in `api/sitemap.js` has 8 entries: fastest, death metal, most innovative, thrash, budget, expensive, fastest double bass, most brutal solos. Three high-TAM genre segments have zero list coverage:

- **Black metal** — Hellhammer, Frost, Inferno, Infernus all on roster. Zero 'top black metal drummers' content.
- **Progressive metal** — Mike Portnoy, Danny Carey, Brann Dailor, Matt Garstka all on roster. High search intent.
- **Nu-metal** — Jay Weinberg (Slipknot), John Otto (Limp Bizkit), Abe Cunningham (Deftones), Art Cruz (Lamb of God). Strong mainstream crossover TAM.

GSC context: no content-gap queries above 50 impr for these — but that's because we have ZERO indexed content for these queries. These are **supply-side gaps**, not demand-signal gaps.

## New list slugs

```
black-metal-drummers           → "Top 10 Black Metal Drummers"
progressive-metal-drummers     → "Top 10 Progressive Metal Drummers"  
nu-metal-drummers              → "Top 10 Nu-Metal Drummers"
```

## Files to touch

1. **`packages/frontend/data/listsData.js`** (or equivalent top10 data file) — add 3 new list entries
2. **`api/sitemap.js`** — add 3 slugs to `top10Lists` array
3. **Render layer** — create list page content (≥300 words, ≥3 internal drummer links each)
4. **`public/llms/lists/black-metal-drummers.md`**
5. **`public/llms/lists/progressive-metal-drummers.md`**
6. **`public/llms/lists/nu-metal-drummers.md`**
7. **`public/llms/lists.md`** — update to reference new lists

## Template (list page)

```markdown
# Top 10 [Genre] Metal Drummers

## Overview
[150+ word intro: genre history, what makes drumming distinct in this genre]

## The List
1. [Drummer Name] — [Band] — [Why they're on the list]
   [Internal link to /drummer/<slug>]
...

## FAQ
Q: Who is the best [genre] metal drummer?
A: ...
Q: What equipment do [genre] metal drummers use?
A: ...
Q: Who invented [genre] metal drumming?
A: ...

## Related
[Links to related list pages, technique pages, drummer profiles]
```

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words per list page (HTML)
- ≥3 Q&A pairs (FAQPage schema for AI Overview eligibility)
- ≥5 internal links per page (drummer profiles + technique pages)
- CollectionPage + FAQPage JSON-LD (consistent with other /lists/<slug> pages)
- ≥200 words per LLM .md file

## Expected uplift

- 3 new indexable pages at priority 0.8
- Targets: 'top black metal drummers', 'best progressive metal drummers', 'nu metal drummers list' AI citation queries
- Each page internally links to 10 drummer profiles (PageRank flow)

## Verify

1. `curl https://metalforge.io/lists/black-metal-drummers` returns 200 with content
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep black-metal` shows entry
3. Google Rich Results Test on each page shows FAQPage schema detected
4. `ls public/llms/lists/` shows 11 files (was 8, now 11)
5. Each page has ≥10 internal drummer links

## Done

3 new list pages live at `/lists/black-metal-drummers`, `/lists/progressive-metal-drummers`, `/lists/nu-metal-drummers` + 3 LLM .md files + sitemap updated.
title: SEO batch: New top-10 list pages — black metal, progressive metal, nu-metal drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
